dialogueChunks.plotStep: It took hours of talking, but they finally agreed to return to {location}. I apologized in front of the whole settlement: told everyone the truth about what happened and what I'd done. Some people were angry at me, and they had every right. But {target_npc} looked me in the eye and said, 'We've been neighbors too long for one mistake to end it.' I didn't deserve that grace, but I'll spend the rest of my days earning it.
dialogueChunks.outro: You carried the truth when I was too blinded by suspicion to see it. This is yours, with my deepest gratitude.

playerResponses.text: Grace given freely is the rarest thing in the world. Treasure it.
Next time, talk to someone before you accuse them.
I'm glad it worked out. Take better care of your friendships.

dialogueChunks.intro: The debt is paid, {player_name}. The trader took the {quest_item} and left without trouble.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} broke down when I told them what you'd done. Not anger: relief. Years of carrying that secret alone, and it took one nosy, jealous fool to finally bring it into the open. The irony isn't lost on me. The settlement rallied around {target_npc} once they heard the truth, and now three families have offered to help if the debt collectors ever come back. We're closer than before, believe it or not.
dialogueChunks.outro: My jealousy nearly destroyed someone, but your persistence turned it into something better. Take this: I set it aside from my own savings.

playerResponses.text: Sometimes the worst mistakes lead to the best outcomes. Hold onto this.
Just remember this feeling next time suspicion starts whispering.

dialogueChunks.intro: It's over, {player_name}. The truth is out, and I feel lighter and heavier at the same time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc}'s relative is recovering, thanks to the {quest_item} you brought. And {target_npc} has forgiven me, though they said it'll take time before they fully trust me again. I understand that. I wouldn't trust me either, after what I put them through. The settlement is quieter now: people are being more careful with their assumptions, which is maybe the one good thing to come out of my foolishness.
dialogueChunks.outro: You saw through my suspicion to the truth underneath. I'll carry that lesson for the rest of my life. Please, take this with my thanks.

playerResponses.text: Trust takes time to rebuild. But the fact that you're trying says a lot.
Lessons learned the hard way stick the longest. Be well.
